description.zh-Hans: 降采样再升采样，营造像素艺术风格外观。对于让程序生成的输出看起来像手绘而非模糊效果至关重要。
description.en: Downsamples and re-upsamples to create a pixel-art style look. Critical for making procedural output look hand-drawn rather than blurry.

triggers.zh-Hans: 像素化, 马赛克, 像素块, 块状效果
triggers.en: pixelate, mosaic, pixel block, block effect

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 对图像进行像素化处理以创建马赛克效果。
exampleUsage.en: Pixelate an image to create a mosaic effect.
